topic_angle: 교수가 알면 화낼 Claude Skill 보고서 한 학기 30개 자동화
essence_5: 매주 반복되는 보고서 양식 Claude한테 분석시키기
Skill 폴더에 양식·예시·도구 한 번에 세팅
이번 주 보고서 써줘 한 줄로 Skill 자동 호출
한 학기 30개 보고서 같은 Skill로 1.5시간 절약
rationale: recent 7일(interface_capture/landscape/portrait/movie_poster)와 recent 5장(#10A37F·#3B6E47·#1A1A2E) 회피. Claude Skill 정보형 토픽이라 manifest의 interface_capture 1순위는 recent로 차단 → 2순위 infographic 선택. accent는 Claude 시그니처 #D97757(Anthropic orange)로 도메인 정확, recent_colors와 완전 다른 계열. nene 톤(스마트폰 candid·자연광·큰 한글 텍스트 박스 60~70% 점유)을 infographic 안에 흡수 — 한국 대학생 책상 위 종이·노트·아이패드 candid 사진을 베이스로 깔고 그 위에 작은 도식(폴더 구조·재활용 30회 카운터·1.5시간 다이얼)을 텍스처처럼 얹어 AI 슬롭 회피.

slides.headline: 교수가 알면 화낼 Claude 보고서 꿀팁 5
slides.label: 대학생 필독 · Claude
slides.prompt:
Slide 1 message: "교수가 알면 화낼 Claude 보고서 꿀팁 5 — 한 학기 30개를 1.5시간에" → visual metaphor: 한국 대학생 책상 위 candid 풍경 — 어지러운 보고서 출력물 더미 한쪽에, 잘 정리된 노트북 화면 Claude 채팅창이 살짝 보이고, 그 위에 손글씨 같은 작은 숫자 도식 '30개 → 1.5h'가 종이 한 켠에 메모돼 있다.

A Korean university student's desk shot candidly from a slightly elevated angle, late afternoon. On the desk: a stack of crumpled printed reports on the left (5~6 papers, some with red pen marks), a slim 13-inch laptop slightly right-of-center showing Claude chat interface in soft focus (the orange Anthropic star mark barely visible on a tab), a hand-written sticky note on top of the reports with marker: '30개 → 1.5h'. A ballpoint pen rests diagonally. A half-finished iced americano cup at the upper-right corner. Background slightly blurred: a dorm room or library desk with afternoon natural light from a window left.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight late afternoon · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing slightly tilted · everyday Korean university student desk · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: soft natural daylight from window-left at 30° elevation, warm afternoon tone, no flash
- camera angle: high three-quarter overhead at 45°, slight handheld tilt
- composition: rule of thirds (paper stack left-third, laptop right-third, sticky note at center intersection), leading lines from desk edge
- mood: relatable-determined, "나도 한 학기 이렇게 살았어" recognition

Color palette: accent #D97757 (Claude orange — sticky note marker and laptop tab), warm beige #F5F0E8 (paper and desk surface), deep slate #0F172A (text overlay box background), warm cream #FFF8EC (ambient light).

Display large hangul text "교수가 알면 화낼\nClaude 보고서 꿀팁 5" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight feeling) inside a cream-white rounded rectangle box covering middle 55% of frame, dark slate text. Below in smaller weight gray text: "한 학기 30개 보고서 1.5시간에 끝내는 법". Small pill-shaped label upper-left with text "대학생 필독 · Claude" in white-on-orange #D97757. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy — especially 화낼, 꿀팁, 보고서.

Texture details: paper fiber visible on reports, marker ink bleed on sticky note, laptop aluminum subtle reflection, condensation on iced cup. No glow effects. No floating UI cards. Real photo feel.

Composition rules: keep upper-right ~120px square clean (handle area). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator). text box dominant — photo as supporting context.

No external account handles. No watermarks. No AI slop (no halation, no neon, no concept art, no 3D render, no editorial studio lighting). The only logo allowed is the legitimate Claude orange star mark barely visible on the laptop tab.

slides.headline: Claude한테 보고서 양식 먼저 분석시키기
slides.subtext: 매주 반복되는 양식, 한 번만 읽히면 끝이에요
slides.label: 비결 1 · 양식 분석
slides.prompt:
Slide 2 message: "매주 반복되는 보고서 양식을 Claude한테 먼저 분석시키기" → visual metaphor: 책상 위 한국 대학교 보고서 양식 종이 1장을 손이 Claude 채팅창 옆에 놓는 candid scene. 종이 위 표·서식이 명확히 보이고, 노트북 화면에는 Claude가 그 양식을 항목별로 분해한 작은 리스트가 떠 있다.

A Korean university report template paper (printed A4, '○○대학교 과제 보고서' header visible, sections like 제목/서론/본론/결론 ruled with thin lines) lies on a light wooden desk. A student's hand from the right edge places the paper next to a slim laptop. The laptop screen shows Claude chat interface (soft focus but readable): user message bubble with text and Claude's reply rendered as a small bulleted breakdown (4~5 bullets like '제목 형식', '서론 분량', '인용 스타일', '결론 톤'). A pen rests on the paper. Morning natural light from upper-left.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight morning · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing · everyday Korean student workspace · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT floating UI cards · NOT editorial fashion.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: cool-warm mixed morning daylight, window upper-left 40° elevation, gentle
- camera angle: overhead three-quarter at 50°, slight tilt to the right
- composition: leading lines from paper edge to laptop screen, rule of thirds (paper left-third, screen right-third)
- mood: focused-curious, "한 번만 읽히면 되는구나"

Color palette: accent #D97757 (Claude orange — Claude reply bullets and small icon), paper white #FAFAFA, warm wood #C8A47C (desk), text overlay box #FFFFFF with dark text #0F172A.

Display large hangul text "Claude한테 보고서\n양식 먼저 분석시키기" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight) inside a white rounded rectangle box covering upper 50% of frame, dark slate text. The word "분석" highlighted with a soft orange #D97757 underline marker style. Below in smaller gray text: "매주 반복되는 양식, 한 번만 읽히면 끝이에요". Small pill label upper-left: "비결 1 · 양식 분석" in white-on-orange #D97757. Hangul perfect 받침·자모 (받침 있는 글자 — 받·먼·끝).

Texture details: paper has subtle grain and folded corner, laptop screen has natural reflection (not glossy CGI), wood desk grain visible, hand skin texture realistic. No glow. No halation.

Composition rules: upper-right 120px clean for handle. bottom 80px clean for dots. text box top-half, photo bottom-half supporting.

No external handles. No watermarks. The only allowed UI is the legitimate Claude chat interface on the laptop.

slides.headline: 양식·예시·도구 Claude Skill 폴더에 한 번에 세팅하기
slides.subtext: 한 번 넣어두면 다음 학기도 그대로 쓸 수 있거든요
slides.label: 비결 2 · Skill 세팅
slides.prompt:
Slide 3 message: "양식·예시·도구 3종을 Claude Skill 폴더 하나에 한 번에 세팅" → visual metaphor: 책상 위 candid 사진 베이스 + 그 위에 작은 폴더 구조 도식 텍스처 — 한국 대학생이 노트북 옆에 정리한 파일 폴더 3장(양식·예시·도구 라벨이 손글씨로 적힘)을 stack해서 Claude Skill 폴더 한 군데로 모으는 듯한 구도.

A Korean university student's hand from the bottom-right is placing three labeled paper folders into a single bigger folder on a beige desk: folder 1 labeled '양식' (template), folder 2 labeled '예시' (examples), folder 3 labeled '도구' (tools) — all written in marker by hand. The bigger folder is labeled 'Claude Skill' with the same marker. Beside them, a slim laptop screen (soft focus) shows a file tree sidebar with a 'Skills' folder expanded. Soft afternoon light.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight afternoon · iPhone 15 default rendering · everyday Korean student desk · NOT studio · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT floating UI · NOT editorial.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: warm afternoon natural light from right window 35° elevation, soft fill
- camera angle: overhead at 60°, near-flat-lay with slight perspective
- composition: 3 folders arranged in diagonal leading into 1 bigger folder (visual metaphor of consolidation), rule of thirds
- mood: organized-satisfying, "한 번에 묶이는 만족감"

Color palette: accent #D97757 (Claude orange — bigger folder label marker and Skill folder icon), kraft brown #C8A47C (paper folders), cream #F5F0E8 (desk), white text box #FFFFFF, dark slate text #0F172A.

Display large hangul text "양식·예시·도구\nSkill 폴더에 한 번에 세팅" with bold sans-serif (Pretendard Black) inside a white rounded box covering upper 55% of frame. "세팅" emphasized with orange #D97757 highlight. Below smaller gray: "한 번 넣어두면 다음 학기도 그대로 쓸 수 있거든요". Small pill label upper-left: "비결 2 · Skill 세팅" white-on-orange. Hangul perfect — 양식, 예시, 도구, 폴더, 세팅 모두 받침·자모 정확.

Texture details: paper folder fiber, marker ink texture on labels, desk surface matte, slight wear marks on folders for realism. No glow. No floating cards.

Composition rules: upper-right 120px clean. bottom 80px clean. photo bottom half, text upper half.

No external handles. No fake logos. Claude Skill is a legitimate feature reference — render as plain text label, not a fictional badge.

slides.headline: "이번 주 보고서 써줘" 한 줄로 Skill 자동 호출하는 법
slides.subtext: 프롬프트 길게 안 써도 Skill이 알아서 처리해요
slides.label: 비결 3 · 자동 호출
slides.prompt:
Slide 4 message: "한 줄 프롬프트로 Skill 자동 호출 — 이번 주 보고서 써줘" → visual metaphor: 노트북 Claude 채팅창에 단 한 줄의 한국어 메시지 "이번 주 보고서 써줘"가 사용자 버블로 막 입력된 candid 화면. 그 아래 Claude가 응답 중인 작은 indicator + Skill 호출됨 표시.

A close-up candid photo of a Korean student's laptop screen on a desk, taken slightly from the side at eye-level. The Claude chat interface fills most of the screen: at the bottom, a user message bubble (cream-orange tinted #D97757 lightened) containing the hangul text "이번 주 보고서 써줘" — readable, perfect 자모. Just above, Claude's reply area shows a small Skill activation indicator with text 'Skill 호출됨: 보고서 작성' and three loading dots. The student's hand (only fingers visible) hovers over the laptop trackpad. Desk surface around shows a notebook and pen, slightly blurred.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight early evening · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing close-up · everyday Korean student workspace · NOT studio · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: soft cool-warm mixed indoor daylight, window from right, ambient room
- camera angle: low side-eye level looking at laptop screen at 20° angle
- composition: laptop screen dominates right 60% of frame, hand on left-bottom third, rule of thirds
- mood: effortless-relief, "한 줄로 끝나는 가벼움"

Color palette: accent #D97757 (Claude orange — user bubble tint and Skill indicator dot), neutral chat background #FAFAFA, deep slate #0F172A text overlay box, soft cream #F5F0E8 ambient.

Display large hangul text "\"이번 주 보고서 써줘\"\n한 줄로 Skill 자동 호출" with bold sans-serif (Pretendard Black) inside a white rounded box covering upper 50% of frame. "한 줄" highlighted with orange #D97757 marker underline. Below smaller gray: "프롬프트 길게 안 써도 Skill이 알아서 처리해요". Tiny sub-CTA at bottom-left of text box in light gray: "저장해두면 학기 시작 전 도움". Small pill label upper-left: "비결 3 · 자동 호출" white-on-orange #D97757. Hangul perfect — 이번, 보고서, 써줘 받침 정확.

Texture details: laptop screen has natural slight reflection (not glossy CGI), chat bubble has subtle drop shadow, keyboard keys visible at bottom edge with realistic wear. No glow. No floating UI outside the laptop.

Composition rules: upper-right 120px clean. bottom 80px clean. text box upper, screen lower.

No external handles. The only UI rendered is legitimate Claude chat interface in Korean.

slides.headline: 인용·첨삭·정리까지 같은 Skill 하나로 처리하기
slides.subtext: 도구 여러 개 안 써도 되니까 진짜 편하더라고요
slides.label: 비결 4 · 올인원 처리
slides.prompt:
Slide 5 message: "인용·첨삭·정리 3가지를 같은 Skill 하나로" → visual metaphor: 책상 위 candid 사진 — 한국 대학생 노트북 옆에 3가지 작업 결과물이 한 장의 종이로 출력돼 나란히 놓여 있다. 종이 한 장에 ①인용 ②첨삭 ③정리가 섹션 나눠 표시. 그 옆에 펜과 형광펜 — Skill 하나가 3개를 다 처리한 시각화.

A Korean student's desk, late evening warm indoor light. On a beige wooden surface: a single A4 printout divided into 3 horizontal sections — top labeled '인용' with a sample citation block (소괄호 안 저자 연도), middle labeled '첨삭' with red pen markings on text, bottom labeled '정리' with a tidy bulleted summary. To the right, a slim laptop screen (soft focus) shows Claude chat with the same Skill name active. A red pen and a yellow highlighter rest beside the paper. A coffee cup at the corner.

medium: smartphone candid · natural warm indoor evening light · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing · everyday Korean student desk · NOT studio · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT floating UI · NOT editorial.

- camera angle: overhead at 55° three-quarter, slight tilt
- composition: single paper divided into 3 sections (visual metaphor of 1 Skill → 3 outputs), rule of thirds
- mood: satisfying-efficient, "하나로 다 되는 안도감"

Color palette: accent #D97757 (Claude orange — Skill indicator on laptop and section dividers on paper), paper white #FAFAFA, warm wood #C8A47C, red ink #C0392B (첨삭 markings), white text box #FFFFFF.

Display large hangul text "인용·첨삭·정리까지\n같은 Skill 하나로 처리" with bold sans-serif (Pretendard Black) inside a white rounded box covering upper 55% of frame. "하나로" highlighted with orange #D97757 underline. Below smaller gray: "도구 여러 개 안 써도 되니까 진짜 편하더라고요". Small pill label upper-left: "비결 4 · 올인원 처리" white-on-orange #D97757. Hangul perfect — 인용, 첨삭, 정리, 처리 받침·자모 정확.

No external handles. No fake logos.

slides.headline: Claude Skill 하나로 한 학기 1.5시간 아끼는 법
slides.label: 비결 5 · 시간 절약
slides.prompt:
Slide 6 message: "같은 Claude Skill 재활용으로 한 학기 30개 보고서 → 1.5시간 절약" → visual metaphor: 한국 대학생 손목시계 또는 책상 위 아날로그 시계와 함께, 옆에 보고서 30장 작은 더미 + 그 위에 'Skill 재활용 30회' 손글씨 메모. 시간이 압축된 candid scene이되 모래시계·glow 같은 슬롭 효과 0.

A candid desk shot from slightly elevated angle, Korean university student workspace. Center-left: a small stack of 30 stapled paper reports neatly piled (visible side shows multiple A4 corners). Center-right: a plain analog desk clock or wristwatch showing about 1:30 (one and a half hours). On top of the report stack, a hand-written sticky note in marker: 'Skill 재활용 30회'. A laptop in soft-focus background showing Claude chat with the same Skill name visible. Afternoon natural daylight.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight late afternoon · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing · everyday Korean student desk · NOT studio · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT floating UI · NOT editorial · NOT hourglass · NOT sand particles.

Cinematic spec:

- composition: paper stack left-third, clock right-third, sticky note bridges them at center, rule of thirds
- mood: matter-of-fact relief, "이 정도면 한 학기 버틸만하네"

Display large hangul text "Claude Skill 하나로\n한 학기 1.5시간 아끼는 법" with bold sans-serif (Pretendard Black) inside a white rounded box covering upper 50% of frame. "1.5시간" highlighted with orange #D97757 marker box highlight. Below smaller gray: "30개 보고서도 같은 Skill 재활용하면 돼요". Small pill label upper-left: "비결 5 · 시간 절약" white-on-orange #D97757. Hangul perfect — 하나로, 학기, 아끼는 받침·자모 정확. 숫자 '30개', '1.5시간' arabic numerals readable.

Texture details: paper stack edges show subtle wear, clock face has realistic glass reflection (not CGI glow), sticky note marker bleed, desk wood grain. No glow. No halation. No sand particles. No hourglass.

slides.headline: 보고서 30개, Claude Skill 1개로 한 학기 버텼어
slides.subtext: 총 1.5시간 절약 — 같은 Skill 그대로 재활용한 결과예요
slides.label: 실제 사례 · 한 학기 기록
slides.prompt:
Slide 7 message: "실제 사례 — 한 학기 동안 30개 보고서를 Claude Skill 단 1개로 처리" → visual metaphor: 책상 위 candid 사진 + 작은 도식 텍스처 — A4 보고서 30장이 가로 5열 × 세로 6행으로 책상에 펼쳐져 있고, 그 위에 손글씨 체크마크가 30개 그려진 메모지가 한 학기 기록처럼 놓여 있다. 옆에 노트북 Claude Skill 이름 한 개가 작게 비친다.

A Korean university student's desk shot from overhead near-flat-lay angle. 30 small A4 report covers (or paper stacks of 30 in a neat grid) arranged in a 5×6 grid filling most of the desk surface — each report has a small handwritten check mark in orange marker. On the top-right corner of the grid, a sticky note: '한 학기 30회 · 1.5h'. To the side, a slim laptop in soft focus showing Claude chat with a single Skill name highlighted. Late afternoon natural light.

- composition: 5×6 grid dominates frame (visual evidence of 30개), sticky note at top-right intersection, laptop at edge, rule of thirds
- mood: documentary-evidence, "진짜 한 학기 이렇게 버텼다"

Display large hangul text "보고서 30개, Claude Skill 1개로\n한 학기 버텼어" with bold sans-serif (Pretendard Black) inside a dark slate #0F172A rounded box with white text covering upper 45% of frame. "30개" emphasized in orange #D97757. Below smaller light-gray text: "총 1.5시간 절약 — 같은 Skill 그대로 재활용한 결과예요". Small pill label upper-left: "실제 사례 · 한 학기 기록" white-on-orange #D97757. Composition rules: upper-right 120px clean. bottom 80px clean. text upper-half, photo grid lower half.

No external handles. No watermarks. Numbers 30 and 1.5 readable as arabic numerals.

slides.headline: 이 Skill 세팅법, 저장해두고 학기 시작 전에 써봐
slides.subtext: 팔로우하고 댓글 남겨주시면 Skill 템플릿 DM 드려요
slides.label: 저장 · 팔로우 유도
slides.prompt:
Slide 8 message: "저장하고 팔로우 + 댓글 → Skill 템플릿 DM" → visual metaphor: 운영자의 candid 작업공간 사진 — 한국 20대 손이 노트북 키보드 위에 살짝 얹혀 있고, 화면에는 Claude Skill 폴더가 정리된 모습. 그 옆에 Instagram 저장 북마크 아이콘 + 팔로우 버튼 mockup + DM 화살표 아이콘 3종이 작은 도식으로 화면 가장자리에 떠 있다.

A Korean 20-something founder's workspace candid shot: a 30대 초반의 손목과 손가락만 보이며(얼굴 없음) 슬림 노트북 키보드 위에 가볍게 얹혀 있다. The laptop screen shows a tidy file tree with a 'Claude Skills' folder expanded — one Skill named '보고서 작성' highlighted. Beside the laptop on the warm wooden desk: a small notebook, a pen, and a half-finished coffee cup. Soft early evening warm indoor light.

On the slide composition (overlaid as part of the design, integrated naturally): a rounded blue Instagram-style follow button mockup with hangul text "팔로우" in white on Instagram-blue #4285F4 (or accent #D97757 variant), positioned right-middle area. A bookmark/save icon (Instagram bookmark outline shape, dark slate stroke) at lower-left of the text box. A DM/share arrow icon (paper-plane outline) next to the bookmark. All three icons clearly visible — NOT text-only CTA.

medium: smartphone candid · natural warm indoor evening light · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing · everyday Korean founder workspace · NOT studio · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT floating UI cards beyond the legitimate Instagram CTA icons · NOT editorial.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: warm tungsten-mixed evening from upper-right lamp, gentle fill
- camera angle: low three-quarter near eye-level looking down at desk at 35°
- composition: hands and laptop center-left, CTA icons right-side stacked, rule of thirds
- mood: friendly-inviting, "같이 해보자"

Color palette: accent #D97757 (Claude orange — Skill folder highlight and sticky accents), Instagram blue #4285F4 (follow button — or alternative orange-variant of accent), warm beige #F5F0E8 (desk), white text box #FFFFFF, dark slate #0F172A text.

Display large hangul text "이 Skill 세팅법,\n저장해두고 학기 시작 전에 써봐" with bold sans-serif (Pretendard Black) inside a white rounded box covering upper 50% of frame. "저장" emphasized with orange #D97757 highlight marker. Below smaller gray: "팔로우하고 댓글 남겨주시면 Skill 템플릿 DM 드려요". The follow button mockup is a separate rounded rectangle with hangul "팔로우" white-on-#4285F4 (or accent), positioned bottom-right of text box. Bookmark icon (dark stroke outline) + paper-plane DM icon (dark stroke outline) in a small row below the headline. Small pill label upper-left: "저장 · 팔로우 유도" white-on-orange #D97757. Hangul perfect — 세팅법, 저장해두고, 학기, 써봐 받침·자모 정확.

Texture details: realistic hand skin, keyboard key wear, paper notebook fiber, ceramic coffee cup, desk wood grain. The CTA icons rendered as clean flat outline (Instagram-style), not 3D-glowing. No halation. No floating glow.

Composition rules: upper-right 120px clean for handle. bottom 80px clean for dots. text upper, photo + CTA icons lower.

No external account handles in the rendering. Three CTA visual elements (follow button mockup + bookmark icon + DM/share icon) all clearly visible — this is mandatory per v0.2.1 CTA rule.
